expectations.text: Output contains exactly 3 use case sections
expectations.evidence: Three use cases: (1) AI-Powered Lead Qualification from LinkedIn, (2) Personalized Outreach Email Generation at Scale, (3) Automated Post-Outreach Follow-Up Sequences

expectations.text: Each use case includes at least one specific metric â€” a number, percentage, time range, or dollar range â€” in the ROI field
expectations.evidence: UC1: '30-50%', '120 hours/week'; UC2: '2-4x reply rates', '1.5-2.5 hours per rep per day', '22-37 hours'; UC3: '15-25%', 'under 4 hours'

expectations.text: Each use case contains a 'Hook:' line with an outreach-ready sentence in quotes
expectations.evidence: All 3 use cases have '**Hook:**' followed by a sentence in double quotes

expectations.text: Use cases cover at least two different dimensions (operational efficiency, revenue/growth, customer experience) â€” not all three on the same theme
expectations.evidence: Explicitly labeled: Operational Efficiency, Revenue/Growth, Customer Experience

expectations.text: Use cases reference specific details from the input (e.g., LinkedIn lead qualification, outreach emails, 15-person sales team, burnout) â€” not generic AI descriptions
expectations.evidence: References LinkedIn qualification, 15 reps, custom outreach emails from scratch, Proxycurl/Clay enrichment tools, email engagement signals

expectations.text: Output ends with a quick pitch summary section containing 3 bullets
expectations.evidence: Ends with '**Quick pitch summary**' followed by exactly 3 bullets
